Name: Users can view own profile
SQL / Logic: CREATE POLICY ""Users can view own profile"" ON profiles FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = id)

Name: Admins can view all profiles
SQL / Logic: CREATE POLICY ""Admins can view all profiles"" ON profiles FOR SELECT USING (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM profiles WHERE id = auth.uid() AND role = 'admin'))

Name: Users can view own transactions
SQL / Logic: CREATE POLICY ""Users can view own transactions"" ON transactions FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id)

Name: Users can create transactions
SQL / Logic: CREATE POLICY ""Users can create transactions"" ON transactions FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id)

Name: on_auth_user_created
SQL / Logic: CREATE TRIGGER on_auth_user_created AFTER INSERT ON auth.users FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION handle_new_user()

Name: Metadata Sync
SQL / Logic: CREATE FUNCTION handle_new_user() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$ ... $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER

Name: Admin Logic
SQL / Logic: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION approve_withdrawal(withdrawal_id UUID admin_id UUID) RETURNS JSON ...

Name: OTP Email Service

Name: OTP Verification
SQL / Logic: Invoke via supabase.functions.invoke('verify-otp' { body: { email otp purpose } })

Name: Email Service Auth
Description: API key for Zoho Mail SMTP/API

Name: Get Total Deposits
SQL / Logic: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM deposits WHERE status = 'completed'

Name: Get Active Users
SQL / Logic: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM deposits WHERE status = 'completed'

Name: Reset User Password
SQL / Logic: UPDATE auth.users SET encrypted_password = crypt('new_password' gen_salt('bf')) WHERE email = 'user@example.com'

Name: Sync Balances
SQL / Logic: UPDATE wallets w SET balance = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(net_amount) 0) FROM transactions WHERE user_id = w.user_id AND transaction_type = 'deposit' AND status = 'completed') - ...
